title: Chief Technology Officer
summary: The Chief Technology Officer builds the technical foundation that keeps Neuroartan secure, stable, scalable, and ready for real use.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role leads software architecture, security, resilience, deployment discipline, and the technical systems that make ICOS dependable.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Build the technology that allows ICOS to work securely, scale carefully, and become a reliable product across platforms.
